goal_name: Align existing recovery capability audit and production integration
scope: Goal A only: audit existing fixes, make production recovery paths executable, and close explainable residual failures without repeating rejected broad experiments

known_capabilities.implementation: align coverage, zero-token, dense-zero and local interpolation controls
known_capabilities.observed_result: nine same-input variants changed failure classification or zero-token counts but produced no ASS target improvement

known_capabilities.known_gap: not integrated as a unified first-Align failed-dialogue recovery executor

supports: completed_coarse write with backup and audit

known_capabilities.known_boundary: post-edit text changes only; it is not a replacement for failed initial Align recovery

prohibited_repeats: do not rerun the nine broad Align parameter variants without a new falsifiable hypothesis
do not retry MFA full replacement
do not restore retired LLM split variants
do not move the entire MiMo or general LLM proofread stage before Align
do not optimize OP/ED lyrics as dialogue failures
do not use reference ASS text as ASR or Align input
